  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static TacletGenerator getInstance()

    • generateAxiomTaclet

      public Taclet generateAxiomTaclet(Name tacletName, JTerm originalAxiom, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> programVars, KeYJavaType kjt, RuleSet ruleSet, TermServices services)
      Returns a no-find taclet to the passed axiom. If the axiom expression does not contain reference to self, it is considered as if it were static.

    • generateRewriteTaclet
